user_query: I'm hosting a family reunion and I want to make it memorable. Find a list of available joke categories from the World of Jokes API to entertain the guests. Also, provide me with a random manatee joke to include in the reunion invitations. Additionally, fetch a funny joke from the Chuck Norris collection to share during the event.

TaskList.description: Fetch a list of available joke categories from the World of Jokes API.
Select a random joke category from the list obtained in Subtask 1.
Get a random manatee joke from the World of Jokes API using the selected category.
Fetch a funny joke from the Chuck Norris collection.
